title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Lulu Hypermarket India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Lulu Hypermarket India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!
